query:
ALTER TABLE dev_reviews
  ADD COLUMN isVine INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Vine评论',
  ADD COLUMN hasImage INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '含图片',
  ADD COLUMN hasVideo INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '含视频',
  ADD COLUMN reviewerName VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '评论人';
